subject: Re: Midnight Express
body:
yes cover 4 yes hardtop , the back can be open. but an entry to the front required,,, similar to formula 45 with windscreen  and sunroof. 

----- Original Message ----
From: "kellens@earthlink.net" <kellens@earthlink.net>
To: J J <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, January 8, 2007 3:49:22 PM
Subject: Fw: Midnight Express



  



-----Original Message-----

From: "Harris Glaser" <harris@midnightboats.com>

Date: Mon, 8 Jan 2007 15:33:26 

To:<kellens@earthlink.net>

Subject: RE: Midnight Express



Sarah,



Could you please ask Mr. Epstein if he would like Bolster seats?  And if

so would he want a total of 2 people covered, or 4 people covered.

Also, would he want a hardtop?  We are thinking of the full helm

enclosure to go from the front of the console to the back of the second

set of Bolster seats.  The doors would be on hinges and would have glass

the whole way down. Is this what he wants?  Please let me know so I can

give better direction to the design team.



Harris Glaser

Vice President

Midnight Express Powerboats

 

4720 NW 15th. Ave

Unit C

Fort Lauderdale, FL 33309

 

www.midnightboats.com
